name: WhatsApp Loyalty Reward
description: On every Shopify order, increments a Redis counter for the buyer and routes them through a tiered loyalty switch at 10, 25, and 50 lifetime orders. Each qualifying tier generates a Shopify discount code, delivers it to the customer over a WhatsApp Business template, tags the buyer's Klaviyo profile with the tier, and posts a celebration message to the #loyalty-program Slack channel.
